M-074.NAME: responsive-device-adaptation
M-074.path: frontend frontend-admin docs/plans/Phase-61.xml docs/plans/Phase-62.xml docs/plans/Phase-67.xml docs/plans/Phase-68.xml docs/plans/Phase-71.xml docs/plans/Phase-72.xml docs/plans/Phase-74.xml scripts/phase61-responsive-adaptation-smoke.mjs scripts/phase62-compactness-deletion-smoke.mjs scripts/phase67-auth-splash-smoke.mjs scripts/phase68-dashboard-subscription-smoke.mjs scripts/phase71-device-config-master-detail-smoke.mjs scripts/phase72-user-auth-navigation-smoke.mjs scripts/phase74-admin-shell-navigation-smoke.mjs
M-074.owns: Phone, tablet, and desktop responsive closure for public, user, and admin Matrix surfaces.
M-074.purpose: Make the premium frontend usable and compact across mobile phones, tablets, and desktop screens.

exports.rule-responsive-density: Responsive spacing, grid, navigation, and bounded-scroll rules.
exports.rule-matrix-rain-overscan: Matrix canvas/fallback background uses mobile viewport overscan to avoid bottom-edge black cutoffs.
exports.rule-phase72-bottom-dock: Mobile user bottom navigation uses safe-area padding and content spacing so primary cabinet actions remain reachable without overlap.
exports.rule-phase74-admin-scroll: Desktop admin content owns overflow-y scrolling while the admin rail is clipped to 100dvh.

constraints.constraint-1: No document-level horizontal scroll at any planned viewport.
constraints.constraint-2: Tablet layouts must not be lazy stretched phone layouts or cramped desktop layouts.
constraints.constraint-3: Primary VPN, MTProto, subscription, admin health, and emergency actions must stay reachable.

acceptance-metrics.metric-1: User and admin builds pass with Phase-61 viewport/static-route smoke evidence.
acceptance-metrics.metric-2: No visible text overlap, icon overlap, clipped critical values, or document-level horizontal-scroll static drift is allowed by the Phase-61 smoke.
acceptance-metrics.metric-3: Reduced-motion proof remains readable across phone and tablet viewport classes.
acceptance-metrics.metric-4: Phase-62 folded surfaces keep 44px summaries, no horizontal-scroll guards, bounded lists, and responsive compactness markers.
acceptance-metrics.metric-5: 390x844 user/admin browser screenshots show Matrix rain/fallback through the bottom viewport edge.
acceptance-metrics.metric-6: Phase-68 compact dashboard subscription/tariff/calendar layout stays within Phase-61 responsive budgets and Phase-60 QA bundle limits.
acceptance-metrics.metric-7: Phase-71 proves master-detail device config UX and sticky mobile actions stay readable across phone, tablet, desktop, and reduced-motion viewports.
acceptance-metrics.metric-8: Phase-72 proves the mobile dock and smaller desktop calendar keep no-overlap/no-horizontal-scroll guarantees with frontend/admin build budgets intact.
acceptance-metrics.metric-9: Phase-74 proves admin rail viewport bounds, content-area wheel scroll, and login icon no-overlap without changing user responsive surfaces.

phase-67-verification-design.scope: Apply responsive closure to the new splash-only / route and frameless auth screens without changing protected user/admin layouts.
phase-67-verification-design.viewports: Phase-67 must cover 320x568, 360x740, 390x844, 430x932, 768x1024, 1024x768, 1280x720, 1440x900, and reduced-motion auth/splash states.
phase-67-verification-design.guards: No document-level horizontal scroll, no logo/control overlap, no icon/placeholder overlap, no clipped secondary auth actions, no hidden redirect status under reduced-motion, and 44px-safe primary/secondary actions on phone/tablet.

evidence.item: 2026-06-04: Added Phase-61 responsive CSS blocks to user and admin Matrix style systems with phone/tablet breakpoints, safe-area padding, bounded scroll, text wrapping, and 44px touch-target policy.
2026-06-04: Added Phase-61 layout markers to user and admin shells for viewport matrix, mobile header/nav safe-area, protected user static proof, and admin static proof.
2026-06-04: Added root min-width containment to admin Analytics and Servers route surfaces to protect chart/topology pages on phones and tablets.
2026-06-04: frontend and frontend-admin production builds passed; Phase-61 smoke and Phase-60 premium QA regression gate passed.
2026-06-04: Protected backend/deploy/runtime guard remained empty; authenticated protected-route screenshots remain clean-deploy follow-up evidence.
2026-06-04: Phase-62 compactness/deletion audit smoke and Phase-61 responsive regression passed after adding user/admin details folds and bounded secondary surfaces.

2026-06-04: Phase-67 auth/splash responsive work passed frontend/admin builds, Phase-67 smoke, Phase-60 QA, Phase-61 responsive, Phase-62 compactness, and protected backend/deploy/admin/runtime guards for large unframed logo, red-focus inputs, secondary auth actions, and reduced-motion fallback.

2026-06-04: Matrix rain reliability hotfix added Phase-61 assertions for .matrix-rain-fallback and 100dvh+128px overscan. User/admin builds, Phase-61 smoke, Phase-60 QA regression, Chrome mobile screenshots, bottom-pixel sanity, and protected backend/deploy/runtime guard passed.
2026-06-04: Phase-68 dashboard subscription merge passed Phase-61 responsive smoke, Phase-60 QA, frontend/admin builds, and compact calendar/tariff no-overlap guards.
2026-06-05: Phase-74 admin shell changes passed frontend-admin build and Phase-74 smoke for admin rail bounds, content-scroll surface, and login icon no-overlap.

phase-71-executed-scope.primary-behaviors: Verify the master-detail device config UX, sticky mobile QR/.conf/Copy actions, sidebar logout order, logo frame removal, and calendar boundary emphasis across phone, tablet, desktop, and reduced-motion viewports.
phase-71-executed-scope.acceptance: 360x740, 390x844, 430x932, 768x1024, 1024x768, 1280x720, and 1440x900 must remain free of horizontal scroll and action overlap.

M-074.hotspot: H-061: Tablet and mobile adaptation must be verified on real breakpoint classes, not inferred from desktop layouts.
M-074.phase-71-evidence: Frontend build and Phase-71 smoke passed for mobile sticky config actions and 9-device master-detail markers; post-commit Phase-61 and Phase-62 protected regression smokes passed cleanly.

phase-72-executed-scope.primary-behaviors: Verify mobile bottom navigation no-overlap, safe-area spacing, stable touch target dimensions, desktop calendar no-overflow, and reduced-motion-safe dock transitions.
phase-72-executed-scope.acceptance: Phase-61 responsive smoke passed after frontend and frontend-admin builds, with bundle budgets under limits and protected backend/deploy/runtime guard clean.

M-074.phase-72-evidence: Phase-72 passed local responsive verification for mobile dock no-overlap and desktop compact calendar no-overflow.

phase-74-executed-scope.primary-behaviors: Bound admin rail to the viewport, move scroll ownership to admin content on desktop, and keep mobile tabbar free of the retired Tariffs item.
phase-74-executed-scope.acceptance: Phase-74 smoke passed ResponsiveAdaptation markers for ADMIN_SCROLL_NO_OVERLAP and ADMIN_RAIL_VIEWPORT_SAFE.

M-074.phase-74-evidence: Responsive adaptation passed local Phase-74 verification for admin shell scroll and rail geometry.
